channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 lyra81604/zhengxi-views — 771⭐ (257.0/day)
item.description:
可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
Score: 100/100 | Growth: 257.0 stars/day | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 sums001/Windows-Copilot-API — 412⭐ (137.3/day)
item.description:
Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
Score: 100/100 | Growth: 137.3 stars/day | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 overflowy/make-look-scanned — 354⭐ (177.0/day)
item.description:
Makes PDFs look scanned (CLI or in the browser via WASM)
Score: 100/100 | Growth: 177.0 stars/day | Language: Go

item.title: 🔥 yo-WASSUP/Good-Badminton — 352⭐ (176.0/day)
item.description:

item.title: 🔥 raiyanyahya/recall — 347⭐ (115.7/day)
item.description:
Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
Score: 100/100 | Growth: 115.7 stars/day | Language: Python
